name: Streets of Your Town
overview: A look at the aesthetics of our suburbs.  Tim Ross – comedian, broadcaster and aficionado of the Modernist era – is tour guide for this very personal journey exploring how and why our suburbs look the way they do. Travelling the country gaining unprecedented access to some of our most epic homes, meeting their owners, peeling back their history and revelling in their beauty Tim poses the question: from Modernism to McMansionism – how did we get here?

trailers.title: Streets Of Your Town: Modernism to McMansionism
